message:
Implement execution-context classification (git_safety_guard-t8x.2)

- Add src/context.rs with SpanKind enum, Span/CommandSpans structures
- Implement shell tokenizer for quotes, pipes, command substitution
- Detect inline code patterns (bash -c, python -c, node -e, etc.)
- Add 26 unit tests including performance verification
- Performance: 0.10μs/command (1000x under 100μs budget)
- Fix clippy lints in cli.rs (needless_pass_by_value, implicit_clone)

This unblocks:
- git_safety_guard-fpim (false positive reduction)
- git_safety_guard-1gt.1 (explain command)
- git_safety_guard-7tg.2 (fuzzing harness)
- git_safety_guard-99e.8 (token-aware gating)

All 92 unit + 137 E2E tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,23 +34,23 @@ jobs:
           # Linux x86_64
           - os: ubuntu-latest
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            artifact_name: git_safety_guard
+            artifact_name: dcg
           # Linux ARM64 (native build on ARM64 runner)
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            artifact_name: git_safety_guard
+            artifact_name: dcg
           # macOS Intel
           - os: macos-13
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
-            artifact_name: git_safety_guard
+            artifact_name: dcg
           # macOS Apple Silicon
           - os: macos-14
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
-            artifact_name: git_safety_guard
+            artifact_name: dcg
           # Windows
           - os: windows-latest
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
-            artifact_name: git_safety_guard.exe
+            artifact_name: dcg.exe
 
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     permissions:
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ jobs:
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         run: |
           mkdir -p dist
-          TARBALL="git_safety_guard-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.xz"
+          TARBALL="dcg-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.xz"
           cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
           tar -cJf "../../../dist/$TARBALL" ${{ matrix.artifact_name }}
           cd ../../../dist
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
         run: |
           New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist | Out-Null
-          $zipName = "git_safety_guard-${{ matrix.target }}.zip"
+          $zipName = "dcg-${{ matrix.target }}.zip"
           Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact_name }}" -DestinationPath "dist/$zipName"
           cd dist
           $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 $zipName).Hash.ToLower()

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ show_help() {
     cat << EOF
 Usage: $0 [options]
 
-Generate code coverage reports for git_safety_guard.
+Generate code coverage reports for dcg.
 
 Options:
   --open      Open HTML report in browser after generation

@@ -219,9 +219,9 @@ test_command_with_packs() {
     local encoded
     encoded=$(echo -n "$json" | base64 -w 0)
 
-    # Run the binary with GIT_SAFETY_GUARD_PACKS environment variable
+    # Run the binary with DCG_PACKS environment variable
     local result
-    result=$(echo "$encoded" | base64 -d | GIT_SAFETY_GUARD_PACKS="$packs" "$BINARY" 2>/dev/null || true)
+    result=$(echo "$encoded" | base64 -d | DCG_PACKS="$packs" "$BINARY" 2>/dev/null || true)
 
     # Check result
     if [[ "$expected" == "block" ]]; then

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ show_help() {
     cat << EOF
 Usage: $0 [options]
 
-Fast feedback loop for git_safety_guard development.
+Fast feedback loop for dcg development.
 
 Options:
   --check     Run clippy and fmt checks first
